meta.title: Fentriq | Software development studio | Web, Apps, AI, Automation
meta.description: Full-stack software development studio for Italian SMEs. Custom websites, applications, artificial intelligence and automation. From the first idea to production, fast.

hero.titleBefore: We build the software that helps your business
hero.subtitle: Custom websites, applications, artificial intelligence and automation. From the first idea to production — fast, no fluff.
hero.stack: Web · App · AI · Automation · Algorithms · Software · Web3

services.title: One studio, the whole stack.
services.subtitle: From the first line of code to production. What you need, built to measure.

web.title: Web & App Development
web.description: Fast, custom sites and applications, ready to scale and grow with your business.

automation.title: Automation & Integrations
automation.description: We connect your tools and automate repetitive processes, with custom bots and workflows.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence & Algorithms
ai.description: AI pipelines and algorithms that read documents, extract data and flag anomalies in real time.

web3.title: Web3 & Blockchain
web3.description: Smart contracts, wallets and dApps in production, accessible even to non-technical users.

showcase.title: Our products, in one minute.
showcase.subtitle: A quick look at what we build for SMEs.

work.title: What we've shipped recently.
work.subtitle: Real products, in production. No mockups, no promises.

process.title: From call to launch, no surprises.
process.subtitle: A clear process designed to show you real results from day one.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: A call to understand the problem, the goals and the numbers.

proposal.title: Proposal
proposal.description: Scope, timeline and price clear before we start.

development.title: Development
development.description: We show you real progress, not promises. Fast iterations.

launch.title: Launch & support
launch.description: We ship to production and stay to help it grow.

fast.title: Genuinely fast
fast.description: Prototypes and MVPs in days, not months.

ownership.title: Your code, no lock-in
ownership.description: The code is yours. No hidden dependencies.

direct.title: One point of contact
direct.description: You talk to whoever builds it, not a salesperson.

demo.title: This site is a demo
demo.description: The form below triggers a real automation: the same one we build for you.

pricing.title: Three ways to work together.
pricing.subtitle: We pick the right format together after a free call.

project.title: Project
project.description: Fixed scope and budget. Ideal for a site, an app or a concrete automation.

retainer.title: Monthly retainer
retainer.description: A development team at your disposal, every month.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.description: Technical audit, stack selection, code review.

pricing.cta: Book a call for a quote

cost.q: How much does a project cost?
cost.a: It depends on scope. After a free call we give you a clear, fixed quote.

time.a: An MVP or a site in 1–3 weeks; larger projects in stages.

where.q: Do you only work in Rome?
where.a: We work with SMEs across Italy, remotely. In person in Rome, Milan and Florence.

scope.a: No: web, apps, AI, Web3 and automation. Full-stack.

cta.title: Got an idea or a process to automate? Let's talk.
cta.subtitle: A free, no-strings 30-minute call. We'll tell you right away if we can help.

chat.title: Fentriq Assistant
chat.greeting: Hi! 👋 I'm the Fentriq assistant. I can help you understand what we do or book a call. How can I help?
chat.error: Oops, something went wrong. Try again or book a call.
chat.notConfigured: The chat isn't live yet. Write to info@fentriq.app or book a call.
chat.disclaimer: AI assistant. For binding details, book a call.
suggestions: How much does a project cost?
